name: Lode Runner
description: Lode Runner is a 2D platformer where the player controls a runner navigating a network of platforms and ladders. The primary objective is to collect all the gold nuggets scattered throughout the level. The runner can run left and right along platforms and climb ladders vertically. The runner cannot jump. A key mechanic is the runner's ability to dig holes into the floor to either side. These holes are temporary and will refill after a short duration. Guards patrol the level, attempting to catch the runner. If caught, the player loses a life. The runner can avoid guards by digging holes for them to fall into. Guards trapped in holes will eventually climb out. Importantly, the runner can walk over a guard that is trapped in a hole. If a guard has a gold nugget and falls into a hole, the gold nugget will be dropped into the hole where the guard will retrieve it upon exiting the hole. Guards can also collect gold nuggets that are directly above their heads when standing in a hole. Levels consist of solid bricks, ladders, and ropes. Gold nuggets are placed in various locations. The game features numerous levels, each with a unique layout. The player progresses to the next level after collecting all gold nuggets on the current level. If the runner gets crushed (e.g. if a hole refills with the runner inside) the runner loses a life.

controls.arrow_left: Move the runner to the left
controls.arrow_right: Move the runner to the right
controls.arrow_down: Climb ladders downwards or descend from ropes
controls.z: Dig a hole to the left of the runner
controls.x: Dig a hole to the right of the runner
